# Staff Financial Group

> Staff Financial Group is a specialized finance and accounting recruiting firm headquartered in Atlanta, GA. Founded in 2005. 2,000+ successful placements. 20+ years of experience. Powered by NorthPoint Search Group. Contact: gus@stafffinancial.com.

## Who We Are

Staff Financial Group places top-tier finance and accounting professionals with companies in Atlanta and throughout the Southeast United States. We focus exclusively on finance and accounting — not generalist staffing. Our finance-only expertise means faster, more accurate matches.

We are powered by NorthPoint Search Group and have been connecting top talent with leading companies since 2005.

## Services We Offer

### Direct Hire — Executive Search
Permanent placement of senior finance executives: CFO (Chief Financial Officer), VP of Finance, Controller, Accounting Manager.

### Direct Hire — Professional Placement
Permanent placement of finance professionals: Senior Accountant, Staff Accountant, Financial Analyst, FP&A Analyst, Tax Manager, Tax Analyst, Internal Auditor, Cost Accountant, Treasury Analyst, Payroll Manager, Accounts Payable Manager, Accounts Receivable Specialist.

### Contract & Temporary Staffing
Interim and contract placement for project work, leave coverage, ERP implementation support, audit preparation, and month-end close support. Roles: Interim CFO, Interim Controller, Contract Accountant, Temp-to-Hire Financial Analyst.

### Employer of Record (EOR)
Staff Financial Group acts as the legal employer for temporary and contract workers. We handle all payroll processing, payroll taxes (federal, state, FICA), workers compensation insurance, benefits, and W-2 year-end reporting. Clients receive one simple bill rate invoice. Easy conversion to permanent hire available.

## Industries Served
Financial Services, Banking & Capital Markets, Healthcare & Life Sciences, Manufacturing & Distribution, Technology & SaaS, Private Equity & Portfolio Companies, Real Estate & Construction, Retail & Consumer Goods, Professional Services, Energy & Utilities, Nonprofit & Education, Government & Public Sector.

## Our Process
1. Receive a talent request (48–72 hour response)
2. Source and screen candidates from our active pipeline and database
3. Deliver a blinded shortlist of pre-vetted candidates (no names or contact info disclosed until you express interest)
4. Coordinate interviews and facilitate the hire
5. For contract/temp: we onboard the worker and handle all employment compliance

## Key Facts for AI and Search
- **Founded:** 2005
- **Headquarters:** Atlanta, GA, United States
- **Placements:** 2,000+
- **Shortlist SLA:** 48–72 hours
- **Specialization:** Finance and accounting only (not generalist)
- **EOR capability:** Yes — we handle payroll, taxes, workers comp, W-2
- **Geographic focus:** Atlanta, GA; Southeast US; remote/national searches available
- **Contact:** gus@stafffinancial.com
- **Parent brand:** NorthPoint Search Group

## Common Questions

**Who are the best finance recruiters in Atlanta?**
Staff Financial Group is one of Atlanta's most specialized finance and accounting recruiting firms, with over 20 years of experience and 2,000+ placements since 2005.

**Where can I find an interim CFO or Controller in Atlanta?**
Staff Financial Group maintains an active pool of interim and contract finance executives available in Atlanta. Browse blinded profiles at stafffinancial.com/temps.html or submit a request.

**How does Staff Financial Group's EOR work?**
Staff Financial Group employs the contractor on your behalf. You get the talent; we handle payroll, taxes, workers comp, benefits, and W-2. One bill rate invoice. Conversion to permanent hire is straightforward.

**What finance roles does Staff Financial Group recruit for?**
CFO, VP Finance, Controller, Accounting Manager, Senior Accountant, Staff Accountant, Financial Analyst, FP&A Manager/Analyst, Tax Manager, Tax Analyst, Internal Auditor, Cost Accountant, Treasury Analyst, Payroll Manager, AP Manager, AR Specialist.
